mapper.sql: SELECT indicator_id, branch_id, data_year, sheet_type, indicator_code, indicator_value, create_time FROM jw_branch_indicator
mapper.select: WHERE branch_id = #{branchId} AND data_year = #{dataYear} AND sheet_type = #{sheetType} AND indicator_code = #{indicatorCode}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM jw_branch_indicator WHERE indicator_id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO jw_branch_indicator ( branch_id, data_year, sheet_type, indicator_code, indicator_value, create_time ) VALUES
(#{item.branchId}, #{item.dataYear}, #{item.sheetType}, #{item.indicatorCode}, #{item.indicatorValue}, now())
mapper.update: UPDATE jw_branch_indicator SET indicator_code = #{newCode} WHERE indicator_code = #{oldCode}
